Bus Timings

Latest J01 Bus Timetable Mall of the Emirates to JVC

September 3, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

As for your information, Mall of Emirates is one of the most famous malls in Dubai. No wonder, many of people often looking for information what kinds of transportation to get there. And one of the best options is by taking the bus.

Among the numerous bus routes available, the J01 bus stands out for its convenience and comprehensive coverage. Connecting the bustling Mall of the Emirates Metro Station with the serene residential community of Jumeirah Village Circle (JVC), the J01 bus route offers a seamless journey through some of Dubai’s most vibrant and diverse areas. Contents

J01 Bus Timetable

Download PDF Bus J01

For the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website, or simply follow this link to view the J01 Bus Timings. If you’re looking for the latest J01 Bus timetable from Mall of the Emirates to JVC, you can find the details below:

The J01 bus operates with a frequency designed to cater to both peak and off-peak hours, ensuring that passengers can rely on regular service throughout the day.

While exact timings can vary, buses typically run every 20 to 30 minutes during busy periods. The first bus depart at 06.30 and the last bus depart at 22.30, on Saturday, the first bus depart at 00.00. And here is j01 bus timetable.

Some other Dubai bus routes you can check out include the 21 bus route, which passes through Al Quoz and Al Ghubaiba Bus Station, as well as the F46, which runs between Ibn Battuta and Dubai Investment Park.

J01 Bus Route

Your journey on the J01 bus begins at the Mall of the Emirates Metro Station, a major transit hub located in Al Barsha.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

This station is not just a gateway to the city’s public transport system but also an entry point to one of Dubai’s most famous malls.

And the last place passed by the bus is Jumeirah Village Circle or also known as JVC. The location of JVC is strategically located between Al Khail Road and Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road and it is well-served by public transport, including buses like the J01 route. So, here is the detail of j01 bus route.- Mall of the Emirates Metro Bus Stop

  • Al Barsha, Rashid Centre for Disabled
  • Al Barsha South 1, Aswaaq Mall
  • Dubai American Academy
  • Jvc, Mayass Blvd A - 01
  • Jvc, Sandoval Lane Apartments - 01
  • Jvc, Al Wazzan Tower - 01
  • Jvc, Prime Business Tower - 01
  • Jvc, Atlantis S - 01
  • Jvc, Tuscan Residences - 01
  • Jvc, Season Community Summer - 01
  • Dubai American Academy - 01
  • Al Barsha A - 01
  • Mall Of Emirates, Saleh Bin Lahej Building - 02
  • Mall Of Emirates Metro Bus Stop - 05

The journey offers a glimpse into the diverse neighborhoods and communities that make up Dubai.Read Also: X25 Bus Route and Timings ## Fare and Payment

Traveling on the J01 bus is both affordable and convenient. Passengers can use the Nol card, a contactless smart card that is valid for all forms of public transport in Dubai, including buses, metros, and trams.

The fare for a one-way trip on the J01 route depends on the distance traveled, but it typically falls within the range of AED 3 to AED 7. This makes it a cost-effective option for daily commuting as well as occasional travel.## Journey Experience

The J01 bus journey from Mall of the Emirates to Jumeirah Village Circle (JVC) is a long but interesting ride through Dubai, offering a diverse look at the city.

As the bus moves toward the quieter, residential areas of JVC, it highlights the contrast between the bustling heart of Dubai and its more relaxed neighborhoods. JVC itself is a growing community with modern developments and trendy local spots, making the journey a great way to see both the established and emerging sides of the city.## Conclusion

The J01 bus route from Mall of the Emirates Metro Station to Jumeirah Village Circle is a testament to Dubai’s efficient and well-organized public transport system.

It provides a reliable, comfortable, and affordable means of commuting between two distinct parts of the city. Whether you’re a resident, a daily commuter, or a visitor eager to explore different neighborhoods, the J01 bus timetable and route offers a convenient and scenic way to navigate Dubai

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: September 3, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
